summary: Full frontend testing of 4 P0 fixes for Partner role: (1) OfferFormModal feesOnlyMode, (2) UniversityFormModal partner validation, (3) Offers tab gated behind university, (4) Messaging tab in PartnerDashboard. All 13 test scenarios passed.

minor.endpoint: Console warning - Date field in OfferFormModal
minor.issue: CONSOLE warning: 'The specified value Ouvert does not conform to the required format yyyy-MM-dd'. Partner offer has deadline='Ouvert' (non-date string). Browser HTML5 date input reports this when loading the feesOnlyMode modal. Pre-existing data issue, not blocking.

issues: Stats show 'Offres publiées: 1 (1 approuvée(s))' but 'Université: 0 (Non soumise)' for the test partner. This means the partner has an existing approved offer without a university (from previous test sessions). The GATE correctly prevents creating NEW offers. However, the stats card may be misleading. Not a new bug - pre-existing test data.

critical_code_review_comments: MINOR: OfferFormModal - The date input field receives 'Ouvert' as a value when the offer has a non-date deadline. When feesOnlyMode is active, this triggers HTML5 validation warnings. Consider normalizing the deadline field to null/empty when non-date values are stored.
MINOR: Multiple 404 console errors on partner dashboard load - likely broken image URLs in pre-existing offer data. Not blocking but should be investigated.

CODE QUALITY: The UniversityFormModal has a CSS overflow issue - div uses both `overflow-hidden` and `overflow-y-auto` in the same element (line 142). While this works in practice, it's semantically inconsistent. The correct approach is just `overflow-y-auto`.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 19: Tested 4 P0 fixes for Partner role. All working. Partner login: partner@test.com/Partner2025!. Admin: admin@winners-consulting.com/Admin2025!. Tests: (1) Partner /partner dashboard loads with 3 tabs (Mon Université, Mes Offres, Messages). (2) Mes Offres tab shows 'Université requise' gate with redirect button when no university submitted. (3) UniversityFormModal opens with isPartner=true validation: header shows 'Requis : tous les champs marqués *, min. 5 photos et 1 vidéo YouTube', amber YouTube field, 0/5 photos counter. Submit without YouTube shows error 'La vidéo YouTube est obligatoire'. Submit with YouTube but < 5 photos shows error 'Au minimum 5 photos sont requises. Vous en avez 0.'. (4) Messages tab works with textarea input (data-testid='partner-message-input') and send button (data-testid='partner-message-send'). (5) Admin at /admin → Gestion → Partenaires → Offres tab: 'Frais' button opens OfferFormModal in feesOnlyMode (fieldset disabled=true, title disabled, only Frais de dossier/Frais de service editable). (6) 'Message' button opens admin messaging modal (data-testid='admin-message-input', 'admin-message-send').
passed_tests: Partner dashboard: 3 tabs visible (Mon Université, Mes Offres, Messages)
Mes Offres tab: 'Université requise' gate visible with 'go-to-university-btn' button when no university
Mon Université tab: 'Soumettre une université' button visible (add-university-btn)
UniversityFormModal opens with isPartner validation header: 'Requis : tous les champs marqués *, min. 5 photos et 1 vidéo YouTube'
UniversityFormModal: Photos counter shows '0/5 minimum' with amber warning
UniversityFormModal: Submit without YouTube URL → error 'La vidéo YouTube est obligatoire (au moins 1 vidéo requise).'
UniversityFormModal: Submit with YouTube but 0 photos → error 'Au minimum 5 photos sont requises. Vous en avez 0.'
Messages tab: Visible and accessible with 'Messagerie AccessHub Global' header
Messages tab: Message input (partner-message-input) is present and interactable
Messages tab: Send button (partner-message-send) is present and enabled when text is entered
Admin /admin → Partenaires → Offres tab: 'Frais' button opens OfferFormModal in feesOnlyMode
Admin feesOnlyMode: Header shows 'Mode révision — seule la section Frais de service est modifiable', fieldset disabled, title input disabled, 'Frais de dossier' and 'Frais de service' are editable
Admin: 'Message' button opens messaging modal with admin-message-input and admin-message-send
